title: Rebirth Mechanism After Death
description: The mechanism by which consciousness re-enters existence after death, described differently across traditions: Tibetan Sidpa Bardo describes attraction toward one of six realm-lights and womb-entrance through vision of copulating parents. Steiner describes a ~2,100-year journey through twelve zodiacal spheres before descent into new incarnation. Egyptian (classical form) describes permanent afterlife in the Field of Reeds. Tantraloka describes traversal of bhuvanas (world-levels) and selection of a suitable receptacle based on residual karma.
